# FM cockpit walkthrough demo: the mission-control tour, NL-driven and recordable

## Context

The L1 demo leaf per the operator's checklist audit (rule 2: every massive epic files its demo leaf — the lane-goal's falsifier + the reach artifact lane 6's guardrail consumes). This is the cockpit half of the pillar-1×2 fusion demo (the A×B×E carrier the weighting-round fold named) and the "watch a real AI engineering team run" walkthrough — the one story no competitor can film.

## The Problem

The cockpit's lane-goal has a PoC falsifier (the operator starts an agent from the UI) but no PUBLIC artifact: nothing a stranger can watch. The demo-to-metric guardrail requires each flagship demo to ship with measurable reach categories — a demo leaf that never files never measures.

## The Architectural Reality

- Rides the lane-3 demo pattern (deterministic NL-driven tour = the test, the demo, AND the recording script — one source of truth; #14589's contract, cockpit-half).
- Tour beats over the REAL module (post-#14632 mount): open the cockpit → fleet grid live (real roster) → burst on the activity stream → drill a resident → pop-out to an OS window (state ticking through) → morning-start cascade → *"…and this team built the app you're watching."*
- Public-safe by construction (no client names; the roster is the public identity set); reach categories per the #14442 discipline attach at publication.
- Depends on the T2–T5 surfaces existing — this leaf FILES now (rule 2) and sequences late (the capstone demo).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Deterministic NL-driven tour (two consecutive runs, identical beat sequence) over the live module.
- [ ] The tour doubles as an e2e spec (a broken beat fails the suite) and the recording script (screen-record a run = the video).
- [ ] Public-safe + fresh-checkout runnable; reach categories attached at publication per the guardrail.
- [ ] Cross-family review before merge.

## Out of Scope

The surfaces themselves (T2–T6 leaves) · the docking-showcase demos (#14589/#14590 — siblings; the fusion demo composes both halves) · metric infrastructure (#14442 discipline consumed).

## Related

Epic #14560 (parent) · siblings #14589/#14590 · the fusion-demo carrier (D#14561 fold) · #14632 (the mount it tours) · D#14561 rule-2.

Sweeps: current window; no equivalent; A2A clean. Structure-map: N/A — app-layer tour + spec.
